description: The patient prefers to perform physical activity early in the morning, preferably before 9:00 AM, when they feel more energetic.
The patient prefers light lunches (salads, vegetables, lean proteins) and tolerates a more substantial dinner better.
The patient prefers to take medications immediately after main meals to reduce gastric discomfort.
The patient prefers walking outdoors rather than using indoor gym equipment. They prefer routes in the park near their home.
